fields.name: Subtle
fields.description: Magic that manifests without obvious display.

fields.name: Manifestation
fields.description: Magic made tangible — raw elemental force given shape and weight.

fields.name: Performance

fields.name: Combo

fields.name: Translocation Stance
fields.description: A magical style for space-bending techniques.
